title: Silky Smooth Spanish Pine Nuts Paella
description: A spicy and velvety Spanish dish featuring pine nuts, this paella is perfect for midnight cravings and is egg-free friendly. It is a dehydrated version of the traditional Spanish paella.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the artichoke hearts, tomato paste, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the dehydrated pine nuts and saffron threads to the paella pan and stir to combine.
Continue to simmer the paella for an additional 10 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the pine nuts are tender.
Remove the paella from the heat and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the paella hot, garnished with additional pine nuts and saffron threads if desired.
